FragmentEntryLink.__html: A paragraph is a self-contained unit of a discourse in writing dealing with a particular point or idea. Paragraphs are usually an expected part of formal writing, used to organize longer prose.
FragmentEntryLink.__editableValues:
{"com.liferay.fragment.entry.processor.editable.EditableFragmentEntryProcessor":{"element-text":{"sv_SE":"Vänta i 30 sekunder och försök igen.","defaultValue":"
	A paragraph is a self-contained unit of a discourse in writing dealing with
	a particular point or idea. Paragraphs are usually an expected part of
	formal writing, used to organize longer prose.
","pt_BR":"Aguarde 30 segundos e tente novamente.","ja_JP":"30 秒待ってから再度お試しください。","fr_FR":"Veuillez patienter 30 secondes et réessayer.","hu_HU":"Várjon 30 másodpercet, és próbálja meg újra.","de_DE":"Bitte warten Sie 30 Sekunden und versuchen Sie es erneut.","ca_ES":"Espereu 30 segons i torneu-ho a provar.","ar_SA":"يُرجى الانتظار 30 ثانية وإعادة المحاولة.","fi_FI":"Odota 30 sekuntia ja yritä uudelleen.","en_US":"Please wait 30 seconds and try again.","zh_CN":"请等待 30 秒并重试。","es_ES":"Espere 30 segundos y vuelva a intentarlo.","config":{"mapperType":"link"},"nl_NL":"Wacht 30 seconden en probeer het opnieuw."}}}
